mapper.select: SELECT department_id, name, zitadel_org_id, netbird_group_id FROM department ORDER BY name
SELECT department_id, name, zitadel_org_id, netbird_group_id FROM department WHERE department_id = #{departmentId}
mapper.update: UPDATE department SET zitadel_org_id = #{zitadelOrgId} WHERE department_id = #{departmentId}
UPDATE department SET netbird_group_id = #{netbirdGroupId} WHERE department_id = #{departmentId}
mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id, u.full_name, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE t.status IS NOT NULL AND t.status <> 'COMPLETED') AS active_task_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE t.status IS NOT NULL AND t.status <> 'COMPLETED' AND t.due_date < CURRENT_DATE) AS overdue_task_count FROM users u LEFT JOIN task t ON t.assignee_id = u.user_id AND t.project_id IN (SELECT project_id FROM project WHERE department_id = #{departmentId}) WHERE u.department_id = #{departmentId} GROUP BY u.user_id, u.full_name ORDER BY u.full_name

SELECT d.department_id, d.name AS department_name, COUNT(t.task_id) AS total_tasks, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE t.status = 'COMPLETED') AS completed_tasks, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE t.status <> 'COMPLETED' AND t.due_date < CURRENT_DATE) AS overdue_tasks, CASE WHEN COUNT(t.task_id) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE t.status = 'COMPLETED')::numeric / COUNT(t.task_id) * 100, 1) END AS completion_rate, (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE t.status <> 'COMPLETED' AND t.due_date < CURRENT_DATE) > 0) AS at_risk FROM department d LEFT JOIN project p ON p.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN task t ON t.project_id = p.project_id WHERE d.department_id = #{departmentId} GROUP BY d.department_id, d.name
